mapper.select: SELECT mem_idx, mem_id, mem_name, mem_email FROM member WHERE mem_idx = #{memIdx}

SELECT a.auction_idx AS auctionIdx, a.buyer_idx AS buyerIdx, a.auction_title AS auctionTitle, a.auction_regdate AS auctionRegdate, a.auction_end_at AS auctionEndAt, a.auction_view_count AS auctionViewCount, s.auction_status_name AS auctionStatusName, s.auction_status_code AS auctionStatusCode, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bid b WHERE b.auction_idx = a.auction_idx) AS bidCount FROM auction a JOIN auction_status s ON a.auction_status_idx = s.auction_status_idx WHERE a.buyer_idx = #{memIdx} AND a.auction_is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY a.auction_regdate DESC

SELECT b.bid_idx AS bidIdx, b.auction_idx AS auctionIdx, b.bidder_idx AS bidderIdx, b.item_idx AS itemIdx, b.bid_price AS bidPrice, b.bid_regdate AS bidRegdate, a.auction_title AS auctionTitle, s.bid_status_name AS bidStatusName, s.bid_status_code AS bidStatusCode FROM bid b JOIN auction a ON b.auction_idx = a.auction_idx JOIN bid_status s ON b.bid_status_idx = s.bid_status_idx WHERE b.bidder_idx = #{memIdx} ORDER BY b.bid_regdate DESC

SELECT b.board_idx AS boardIdx, b.board_title AS boardTitle, b.board_regdate AS boardRegdate, b.board_view_count AS boardViewCount, b.mem_idx AS memIdx, t.board_type_name AS boardTypeName, t.board_type_code AS boardTypeCode FROM board b JOIN board_type t ON b.board_type_idx = t.board_type_idx WHERE b.mem_idx = #{memIdx} AND b.board_is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY b.board_regdate DESC

SELECT b.board_idx AS boardIdx, b.mem_idx AS memIdx, b.board_title AS boardTitle, b.board_content AS boardContent, b.board_regdate AS boardRegdate, b.board_view_count AS boardViewCount, m.mem_name AS memName, t.board_type_code AS boardTypeCode FROM board b JOIN member m ON b.mem_idx = m.mem_idx JOIN board_type t ON b.board_type_idx = t.board_type_idx WHERE b.board_idx = #{boardIdx} AND b.board_is_deleted = 'N'
